meta.title: Loan Payments | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Pay your Prayaan Capital loan EMI online via UPI, NEFT, RTGS, or set up auto-debit.

sections.headline: Easy, Secure Loan Payments
sections.subheadline: Multiple payment options for your convenience.

bullets.title: UPI
bullets.body: Pay via PhonePe, Google Pay, or any UPI app. UPI ID: prayaancapital@bankname

bullets.title: NEFT / RTGS
bullets.body: Account Name: Prayaan Capital Pvt Ltd | A/c: XXXXXXXXXXXX | IFSC: XXXXXX | Bank: [Bank Name], Chennai

bullets.title: Auto-debit (NACH)
bullets.body: Set up standing instructions for automatic monthly EMI deduction. Contact your branch to register.

bullets.title: Cheque / DD
bullets.body: Payable to 'Prayaan Capital Private Limited'. Drop at your nearest branch.

sections.headline: Payment Schedule & Receipts
sections.body: EMI due date is the same date every month as per your sanction letter. Receipts sent within 24 hours of credit.

bullets.title: Grace Period
bullets.body: 3 days from EMI due date before penal interest applies.

bullets.title: Receipts
bullets.body: Sent via SMS and email. Download from your loan statement.

bullets.title: Foreclosure
bullets.body: Contact your relationship manager for a foreclosure statement.
